Body.Content:
Copilot connectors enable organizations to integrate content from other external data sources into Microsoft Graph, improving Copilot’s intelligence, contextual responses, and content discoverability

GA date: June CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot connectors are available for U.S. Department of Defense environment
